    A

    AlertSystem - Class in Unnamed Package
    AlertSystem uses composition to delegate notification behavior.
    AlertSystem() - Constructor for class AlertSystem
    Constructor initializes message log.

    E

    EmailService - Class in Unnamed Package
    Concrete implementation of NotificationMedium for sending emails.
    EmailService() - Constructor for class EmailService
    Default constructor for EmailService.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class AlertSystem
    Main method to run the program.

    N

    NotificationMedium - Interface in Unnamed Package
    Interface representing a notification medium.
    notifyUser(String) - Method in class AlertSystem
    Sends a notification using the current medium.

    S

    send(String) - Method in class EmailService
    Sends an email message.
    send(String) - Method in interface NotificationMedium
    Sends a message using a specific medium.
    send(String) - Method in class SMSService
    Sends an SMS message.
    setMedium(NotificationMedium) - Method in class AlertSystem
    Sets the notification medium.
    showLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
    Displays all logged messages.
    SMSService - Class in Unnamed Package
    Concrete implementation of NotificationMedium for sending SMS messages.
    SMSService() - Constructor for class SMSService
    Default constructor for SMSService.
